title: Develop and implement work instructions and SOPs
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and implement work instructions and SOPs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify and scope the requirements of the work instructions and SOPs

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop or select format according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop or select format according to workplace requirements.
